source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.11 (1,1,1,11)
distilled_thesis: The human appears here as the condition Zarathustra wants to become again, so return is anchored in renewed human nearness rather than abstraction.
